source_evidence: Appendix B.5, Eq. (28)-(30): disc centered at A, normal n = B - A; v = P - A; intersection with disc plane t_w = -(v.n)/(d.n); AW = W - A = v - (v.n/d.n)d; collides iff AW.AW = (v - (v.n/d.n)d).(v - (v.n/d.n)d) <= r^2 with 0 <= t_w <= 1.
purpose: Tests whether a truss member (segment) intersects a flat circular disc restriction primitive by intersecting the segment with the disc plane and checking the distance from the disc center.
assumptions: Disc is flat, centered at A with normal n = B - A pointing toward point B
Segment parameterized as X = P + td, 0 <= t <= 1
formula_or_algorithm: d = Q - P, v = P - A, n = B - A. Plane intersection: t_w = -(v.n)/(d.n); W = P + t_w d. AW = W - A = v - (v.n/d.n) d. The segment collides with the disc iff AW.AW <= r^2 AND 0 <= t_w <= 1.
validation_opportunities: unit tests: through disc interior, outside radius, missing plane, parallel to plane
benchmark on diamond problem (disc discontinuity restriction)

reuse_risk.explanation: Straightforward plane-intersection plus radius test; only care for the parallel-to-plane degeneracy.

missing_information: Handling of d.n = 0 (segment parallel to disc plane)
